---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for ΔSearch
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case(s) where this feature would be valuable.
Example: "As a researcher working on graph optimization, I need to [...]"

## Implementation Ideas

If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, share them here.
This is optional — maintainers may have their own implementation approach.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
